    # Автоматический HTTPS через Let's Encrypt
    tls crahercenter@gmail.com

    # Логирование
    log {
        output file /var/log/caddy/access.log
        format json
    }
}

remstroyproect.ru, www.remstroyproect.ru {
    root * /srv/rsp96
    file_server {
        hide .git
    }

    encode gzip

    # Rewrite clean URLs to static .html files generated by Next.js export
    try_files {path} {path}.html {path}/index.html /index.html

    # Remove server information
    header -Server
    header -X-Powered-By

    # Security headers
    header {
        X-Content-Type-Options "nosniff"
        Referrer-Policy "strict-origin-when-cross-origin"
        X-Frame-Options "SAMEORIGIN"
    }

    # Automatic HTTPS
    tls crahercenter@gmail.com

    log {
        output file /var/log/caddy/rsp96-access.log
        format json
    }
}
